title: EscalationSubmission
description: Payload accepted by POST /admin/escalations/{correlation_id}/submit. Mode-discriminated union: chat-mode submissions carry the user's text answer; claude_code-mode submissions carry the branch identifier and optional SHA. Realizes docs/superpowers/specs/manual-escalation.md §5.2/§5.3 + §9.

answer.description: The user's pasted-back answer to the chat-mode prompt. Min length 50 chars per spec §10.3.

branch.description: Local or remote branch name carrying the manual build. The diff-validator (slice 21) verifies it exists and matches the spec's target paths.

sha.description: Optional commit SHA at submission time. Spec §10.3: resolution is locked to the submission-time SHA; new SHA = new submission.
